info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Returns a specific message based on a required id.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The message ID to be retrieved

schema.description: The message ID to be retrieved

excluded.description: An optional list of excluded audiences

send_times.description: The list of appropriate Send Time Sub-objects associated with the message

created_at.description: The datetime when the message was created

updated_at.description: The datetime when the message was last updated

status.description: The current status of the campaign

archived.description: Whether the campaign has been archived or not

audiences.description: The audiences to be included and/or excluded from the campaign

send_options.description: Options to use when sending a campaign

tracking_options.description: The tracking options associated with the campaign

send_strategy.description: The send strategy the campaign will send with

created_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was created

scheduled_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was scheduled for future sending

updated_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was last updated by a user or the system

send_time.description: The datetime when the campaign will be / was sent or None if not yet scheduled by a send_job.

id.description: The message(s) associated with the campaign

add_tracking_params.description: Whether the campaign needs custom tracking parameters. If set to False, tracking params will not be used.

custom_tracking_params.description: A list of custom tracking parameters. If an empty list is given and add_tracking_params is True, uses company defaults.

is_tracking_clicks.description: Whether the campaign is tracking click events. If not specified, uses company defaults.

is_tracking_opens.description: Whether the campaign is tracking open events. If not specified, uses company defaults.

add_tracking_params.description: Whether the campaign needs custom tracking parameters. If set to False, tracking params will not be used.

custom_tracking_params.description: A list of custom tracking parameters. If an empty list is given and add_tracking_params is True, uses company defaults.

type.description: The type of the tracking parameter

value.description: The value of the tracking parameter

preview_text.description: Preview text associated with the message

from_email.description: The email the message should be sent from

from_label.description: The label associated with the from_email

label.description: The label or name on the message

content.description: Additional attributes relating to the content of the message

is_local.description: Whether the campaign should be sent with local recipient timezone send (requires UTC time) or statically sent at the given time.

send_past_recipients_immediately.description: Determines if we should send to local recipient timezone if the given time has passed. Only applicable to local sends.

display.description: Whether to display a badge on the app icon

dynamic_image.description: The dynamic image to be used in the push notification

notification_type.description: The type of notification to send

kv_pairs.description: The key-value pairs to be sent with the push notification

notification_type.description: The type of notification to send

content.description: Additional attributes relating to the content of the message

kv_pairs.description: The key-value pairs to be sent with the push notification

display.description: Whether to display a badge on the app icon

is_local.description: Whether the campaign should be sent with local recipient timezone send (requires UTC time) or statically sent at the given time.

ios_deep_link.description: required for all platforms enabled for push

android_deep_link.description: required for all platforms enabled for push

content.description: Additional attributes relating to the content of the message

render_options.description: Additional options for rendering the message

datetime.description: The datetime that the message is to be sent

is_local.description: Whether that datetime is to be a local datetime for the recipient

options.description: If the campaign should be sent with local recipient timezone send (requires UTC time) or statically sent at the given time.

type.description: The type of the tracking parameter

value.description: The value of the tracking parameter

editor_type.description:
`editor_type` has a fixed set of values:
* SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE: indicates a drag-and-drop editor template
* SIMPLE: A rich text editor template
* CODE: A custom HTML template
* USER_DRAGGABLE: A hybrid template, using custom HTML in the drag-and-drop editor

html.description: The rendered HTML of the template

amp.description: The AMP version of the template. Requires AMP Email to be enabled to access in-app. Refer to the AMP Email setup guide at https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/send_amp_emails_in_klaviyo

created.description: The date the template was created in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

updated.description: The date the template was updated in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

throttle_percentage.description: The percentage of recipients per hour to send to.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
